title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Mahindra Lifespace

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Mahindra Lifespace
jsonLd.description:
We at Mahindra Lifespace are looking for an experienced Real Estate Agent based out of Varanasi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Mahindra Lifespace:
Mahindra Lifespace is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Lifespace!
